title: November 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 30''' is the 334th day (335th on leap years) of the year, with 31 days remaining, as the final day of November.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Graeme Campbell]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Chris Claremont]] is born.
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Tony Armatrading]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Daniel Keys Moran]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Chris Weitz]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Robert Kirkman]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 24|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 24]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[The Frozen Citadel]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – "[[Asha (episode)|Asha]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airs on ABC.
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 128|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 128]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' released on the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|PlayStation]] platform.
*[[1997]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter#Expansion pack|''Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power'']] released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' released.
*2001 – [[Fraser Kelly]] is born.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 7: When They Were Brothers|''Clone Wars 7: When They Were Brothers'' trade paperback]] released.
*[[2006]] – [[Darth Who Contest]] submission ends.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 2|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 2]] published.
*2011 – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 3|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 3]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Annual (2015) 2|''Star Wars Annual'' (2015) 2]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Alfie Curtis]] dies.
*[[2018]] – "[[Luke Skywalker - The Journey Begins]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Darth Vader - Power of the Dark Side]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Luke vs. the Wampa - Cavern Escape]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[R2-D2 - A Loyal Droid]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Chewbacca - The Trusty Co-Pilot]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Darth Vader - Might of the Empire]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars Affirmation Cards]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Handbook]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Character Encyclopedia, Updated and Expanded Edition]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 29|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 29]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2022) 1|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2022) 1]] published.
<noinclude>
